title: Production Proposal
description: Technical-parameter proposal produced by proposal-director. Locks style_mode, render_runtime, product_reference_strategy, subtitles, dubbing, derivatives, audio_contract, and visual_contract for the ad-video pipeline. Creative direction is owned upstream by the production_bible — this artifact carries only execution decisions.

selected_idea_id.description: References idea_options.selected_concept_id — must match the concept the user picked.

style_mode.description: Visual production mode locked at proposal. EP_STATE and downstream stages read this field; production_bible.visual.style_mode remains upstream audit context.

render_runtime.description: Composition engine locked at proposal. Animated→remotion, cinematic→ffmpeg by default; HyperFrames opt-in. Carried unchanged into edit_decisions.render_runtime.

product_reference_strategy.description: Product identity preservation strategy locked before assets. Physical/product-visible ads use provided references when available, generate an approved concept reference when no asset exists, or require an explicit user-approved risk waiver before text-only video generation.

mode.description: off = no subtitles; burnt-in = ASS burned via ffmpeg subtitles filter; sidecar = separate .srt/.vtt file.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the subtitle track (e.g. 'en', 'zh-CN').

user_confirmed.description: True only after explicit user choice — proposal-director must not silently default.

dubbing.description: Localization dub tracks the user opted into. Empty when no dubs requested.

language.description: BCP-47 target language for the dub.

voice_id.description: Provider-specific voice id for the dub track.

derivatives_added.description: Variant ids the user opted into (e.g. '9:16', '1:1', '15s_short'). Empty when only the primary aspect ratio is rendered.

budget_confirmed.description: True only after the user has reviewed and approved the itemized budget. EP must not advance the pipeline while false.

approved_budget_usd.description: Confirmed budget cap in USD. EP carries this into EP_STATE for spend governance.

music_strategy.description: How the asset stage acquires the music track. generative_loose = MiniMax/Suno text-to-music; arc-shaped output, NOT bar-precise (bass drops drift ±2-5s). Use for atmospheric ads where bar-locked drops are unnecessary. library_locked = require a track from music_library/ with a sidecar <track>.timing.json declaring known structural moments (drop_seconds, downbeats[]). REQUIRED when production_bible.narrative.tension_peak_at_seconds is set AND ±0.5s sync is needed. search_align = search a stock-music provider, use lib.beat_detector to align the drop to tension_peak_at_seconds via trim/pad. none = no background music.

voice_provider.description: Instruction-capable TTS provider the asset stage must use for ALL narration sections. qwen3 routes through cosyvoice_tts/DashScope; openai routes through openai_tts. CosyVoice-family and ElevenLabs models are excluded until their tools can consume locked delivery instructions.

voice_id.description: Provider-specific voice id (e.g. 'Dylan' for qwen3, 'alloy' for openai).

voice_model.description: Provider-specific instruction-capable TTS model. qwen3 requires qwen3-tts-instruct-flash; openai requires gpt-4o-mini-tts. Do not use qwen3-tts-flash, qwen3-tts-instruct, or CosyVoice-family models when speaker_directions or voice_performance must reach the model.

voice_gender.description: User-approved perceived voice gender/register. Must match the selected voice and production_bible.audio.voice_character.

voice_persona.description: Concise approved narrator persona, e.g. 'late-20s product filmmaker, intimate but confident'.

tone.description: Overall vocal tone/register; must be specific enough to reject generic announcer delivery.

baseline_emotion.description: Default emotional state before per-section variation.

emotion_arc.description: How emotion changes across hook, build, reveal, and CTA.

intonation.description: Pitch movement and emphasis policy, including what to avoid.

rhythm.description: Phrase rhythm, speed variation, breath/pause style, and anti-monotony constraints.

pause_policy.description: Where the narrator should leave silence or breath room around reveals and claims.

voice_sample_approved.description: True only after the user has heard and approved a representative voice sample for this voice_id/model/performance lock.

target_speed_wps.description: Target words per second; script-director uses this for word-budget calculations.

target_lufs.description: Target loudness in LUFS (TikTok/Reels/Shorts=-14, YouTube=-13, broadcast=-23).

max_section_drift_pct.description: Asset-director auto-retries if a section's actual TTS duration overruns the planned duration by more than this percentage.

duck_depth_db.description: Music ducking depth (negative dB) during speech windows.

style_direction.description: Anti-template visual direction; deliberate, not generic.

display.description: Display / headline font family + weight (e.g. 'Inter 800 italic').

color_rhythm.description: How color is paced across beats.

default_layers.description: Style layers applied to every scene unless overridden.

per_beat_overrides.description: Map of beat-id (B1, B2, ...) to layer overrides for that beat.

anti_template_checklist.description: Concrete anti-template assertions the scene/asset/compose stages must satisfy.
